name: Intel
analysis: INTC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Price has broken above the base high at $132.7500. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $133.9900, stop $97.3467, target $243.9199 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
